title: SRS Airbag System Structure Description - Impact Sensor
section: Driver assistance SRS airbags seat belts

blocks.text: SRS Airbag System Structure Description - Impact Sensor

The front impact sensor is located near the center of the front bulkhead as a sensor for frontal collision control, and detects impacts near the front of the vehicle. The impact force generated by a frontal collision is detected by the G sensor in the front impact sensor, and when an impact exceeding a set threshold is detected, the impact is converted into an electrical signal and sent to the SRS unit.

Side impact sensors 1 and 2 are located on the left and right sides of the floor near the sides of the vehicle as sensors for side impact control, and detect impacts near the front and rear doors, respectively. The impact force generated by a side collision is detected by the G sensor in the side impact sensor, and when an impact exceeding a set threshold is detected, the impact is converted into an electrical signal and sent to the SRS unit.
